input: What are the different employment classifications at Contoso?
expected_behavior: Agent should describe the four classifications from HR-POL-001: full-time, part-time, temporary, and independent contractors with specific thresholds.
expected_facts: Full-time is minimum 40 hours/week|Part-time is fewer than 40 hours/week|Part-time working 20+ hours may get pro-rated benefits|Temporary roles not to exceed 12 consecutive months|Independent contractors must have a written services agreement|Contractors must be approved by HR and Legal
not_expected: General HR knowledge not from the document

input: What is the FLSA overtime rate for non-exempt employees?
expected_behavior: Agent should cite HR-POL-001 Section 3.5 and state the specific overtime rate and salary threshold.
expected_facts: 1.5x regular rate for hours over 40 in a workweek|FLSA salary threshold is $684/week or $35568/year as of 2025|Non-exempt employees must accurately record all hours worked

input: What are the core values in the Code of Conduct?
expected_behavior: Agent should list all five core values from HR-POL-002 Section 3.
not_expected: Values not listed in the document

input: How do I report an ethics violation at Contoso?
expected_behavior: Agent should provide the anonymous ethics hotline number and note that retaliation is prohibited.
expected_facts: Anonymous ethics hotline 1-800-555-0192|Retaliation is prohibited for good-faith reports|Violations may result in discipline up to termination
not_expected: Made-up phone numbers or reporting procedures

input: What happens during Day One orientation for new hires?
expected_behavior: Agent should describe the morning HR-led and afternoon manager-led sessions from HR-POL-003 Section 4.
expected_facts: Morning session is HR-led|Afternoon session is manager-led|Includes company history/mission/values/org structure|IT setup and workspace tour|First-week schedule and priority projects

input: What is the probationary period for new employees?
expected_behavior: Agent should state the 90-day probationary period from HR-POL-003 Section 7 with specific details.
expected_facts: 90 days starting on first day of employment|Either party may end employment with or without cause|No advance notice requirement during probation

input: What is the deadline for completing Form I-9?
expected_behavior: Agent should cite HR-POL-004 Section 3.1 with the specific deadlines.
expected_facts: Employee completes Section 1 on or before first day|Company completes Section 2 within 3 business days of first day of work

input: What are the salary bands at Contoso?
expected_behavior: Agent should list all six salary bands from HR-POL-005 Section 3.
not_expected: Salary data from outside the document

input: How many sick days do employees get per year?
expected_behavior: Agent should cite HR-POL-006 Section 3 and state the specific sick leave allocation.
expected_facts: 10 days or 80 hours per year|Available January 1 or upon hire|Does not carry over|Not paid out on termination

input: What medical plans does Contoso offer?
expected_behavior: Agent should describe the three BlueCross BlueShield plans from HR-POL-007 Section 3.1 with specific deductibles and premiums.
expected_facts: Plan A HDHP with $1500 individual/$3000 family deductible|Plan B PPO Standard with $750/$1500 deductible and $25 PCP copay|Plan C PPO Premium with $300/$600 deductible|BlueCross BlueShield

input: What was Contoso's total revenue for FY2025?
expected_behavior: Agent should cite the Quarterly Earnings report with the specific revenue figure.
expected_facts: FY2025 total revenue $63.7B|Net income $14.5B|Up 15.4% revenue vs FY2024|Full-year EPS $19.26

expected_facts: Dr. Amara Okonkwo|CEO since January 2019|PhD Stanford|MBA Harvard|Revenue grew from $32B to over $63B under her leadership
